subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the splendours of the Countenance, when the Light was dawning from the Most Exalted Horizon and the Lote-Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بانوار الوجه اذ کان النور مشرقا من الافق الاعلی و السدره
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
